featureName: Sprint 16-18 — Polish, Bug Fixes & UX Hardening
description: Fix real bugs, harden edge cases, and improve UX for both Client and Provider roles. Focus on reliability, input validation, and smoother workflows.

userStories.title: Firestore Stream Error States — Stop Infinite Spinners
userStories.description: All screens using Firestore streams (tasks, bids, chats, notifications, providers, favorites) show a loading spinner forever when the network is unavailable or a query fails. Add proper error states with retry buttons so users know something went wrong.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit all AsyncValue usages in presentation layer — every .when() must handle error case with a user-friendly widget (not just print/log)
Create a reusable ErrorState widget (icon, message, retry button) in core/widgets/
Apply ErrorState to: TaskListScreen, MyTasksScreen, MyBidsScreen, ChatListScreen, ProviderDirectoryScreen, FavoritesScreen, NotificationsScreen
Retry button calls ref.invalidate() on the relevant provider to re-fetch
Verify: if Firestore emulator is stopped mid-session, screens show error state instead of spinner
flutter analyze 0 errors

userStories.title: Phone Input Validation & Country Code Picker
userStories.description: Phone auth screen has a hardcoded +65 country code (TODO in code) and accepts non-numeric input like 'abc1234567'. Add a country code selector and validate phone input is digits only.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace hardcoded +65 with a tappable country code button showing flag + code
Implement a bottom sheet country picker with at least 10 common countries (SG, MY, AU, US, UK, IN, PH, ID, HK, TH)
Default to +65 (Singapore)
Phone number TextField: set keyboardType to phone, add inputFormatter to allow digits only
Validate minimum 7 digits, maximum 15 digits before enabling Send OTP button
Show inline validation error for invalid input
Remove the TODO comment from phone_auth_screen.dart
flutter analyze 0 errors
Write integration test: select country code, enter phone, verify validation

userStories.title: Prevent Duplicate Bid Submission
userStories.description: The submit bid flow has no guard against double-tap or re-submission. A provider can accidentally submit multiple bids on the same task by tapping quickly or navigating back and submitting again.
acceptanceCriteria: In BidRepository.submitBid(), check if a bid from this provider already exists for this task before creating a new one — throw if duplicate
In SubmitBidSheet, disable the submit button and show loading indicator while submission is in progress
After successful bid submission, close the bottom sheet and show a SnackBar confirmation
If provider already has a bid on this task, show their existing bid amount instead of the submit form
On TaskDetailScreen for providers: if they already bid, show 'Bid Submitted: $X' instead of 'Place Bid' button
flutter analyze 0 errors
Write integration test: provider submits bid, verify cannot submit second bid on same task

userStories.title: Auto-Create Chat When Bid Is Accepted
userStories.description: When a poster accepts a bid, no chat is created automatically. The poster and provider must manually navigate to create a conversation. This is a broken workflow — accepting a bid should immediately open a communication channel.
acceptanceCriteria: When poster accepts a bid, automatically create a chat document between poster and provider linked to the task
Send an automatic first message: 'Hi! I accepted your bid for [task title]. Let's discuss the details.'
After bid acceptance, show a SnackBar with action button 'Message Provider' that navigates to the new chat
The chat should appear in both users' chat lists immediately
Chat should have correct taskId, participantIds, and task title metadata
flutter analyze 0 errors
Write integration test: poster accepts bid, verify chat is created with initial message

userStories.title: Image Upload Validation — Size & Type Guards
userStories.description: Photo uploads in chat, profile gallery, and task posting have no client-side validation for file size or type. Users could upload 50MB RAW files or non-image files, causing slow uploads, crashes, or storage abuse.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a shared image validation utility in core/utils/ that checks: file size <= 10MB, file extension is jpg/jpeg/png/heic/webp
Apply validation before upload in: ChatRepository (sendImageMessage), ProfileRepository (uploadProfilePhoto), PostTaskScreen (photo picker)
Show user-friendly error SnackBar if validation fails: 'Image must be under 10MB' or 'Unsupported file type'
If image is > 10MB, do not attempt upload at all
flutter analyze 0 errors

userStories.title: Prevent Duplicate Reviews & Show Reviews on Public Profile
userStories.description: Users can submit multiple reviews for the same task (no dedup check). Also, reviews are stored but never displayed on the public profile screen, making the review system invisible to other users.
acceptanceCriteria: In ReviewRepository, check if a review from this reviewer for this taskId already exists before creating — show error if duplicate
On SubmitReviewScreen, if review already exists for this task, show read-only view of the existing review instead of the form
On PublicProfileScreen, add a 'Reviews' section showing the user's received reviews (latest 10, sorted by date)
Each review card shows: reviewer name, avatar, rating stars, comment text, date, task category badge
Show 'No reviews yet' empty state if none exist
flutter analyze 0 errors
Write integration test: submit review, verify it appears on public profile, verify cannot submit duplicate

userStories.title: Budget & Bid Amount Validation Hardening
userStories.description: Budget field on PostTaskScreen allows 0 or negative values via direct input. Bid amount has no maximum cap. These create nonsensical data and potential abuse vectors.
acceptanceCriteria: PostTaskScreen budget: enforce minimum $5 (show validation error below field if < 5), maximum $10000
If user types a budget value, validate it on form submission — don't rely only on the slider
SubmitBidSheet: enforce minimum bid $1, maximum bid cannot exceed 2x the task budget
Show clear validation messages: 'Minimum budget is $5', 'Bid cannot exceed $X'
Bid amount TextField: set keyboardType to numberWithOptions(decimal: true), add formatter to allow only valid currency input (digits + one decimal point + max 2 decimal places)
flutter analyze 0 errors
